question: What is the cause of Hyper-Chrono Displacement in 'Warp-Slinger' pilots?

answers.ground_truth: Hyper-Chrono Displacement is caused by prolonged exposure to temporal fluctuations or waves generated by the ship's 'Reality Anchor'.
answers.original: Hyper-Chrono Displacement in 'Warp-Slinger' pilots is caused by prolonged exposure to temporal fluctuations during FTL travel, specifically due to the Reality Anchor component on their ships.
answers.perturbed: Hyper-Chrono Displacement in 'Warp-Slinger' pilots is caused by prolonged exposure to temporal fluctuations during FTL travel.

ops.description: Xylo is the largest moon of Quixar and is tidally locked to the planet.
Galaxy-Patterns can create or destroy entire star systems.
The => operator in CortexScript is used for defining anonymous lambda functions.
The Chrono-Regulator was created by the Forgotten Civilization.
Spirit guides serve as bridges between the Spirit-Realm and the physical world.

entities.name: Warp-Slinger Program
entities.description: The Warp-Slinger program is currently under a safety review due to the risks of Hyper-Chrono Displacement.

entities.name: Hyper-Chrono Displacement
entities.description: Hyper-Chrono Displacement is a condition caused by prolonged exposure to temporal fluctuations during FTL travel.

entities.name: Reality Anchor
entities.description: The Reality Anchor is a component on 'Warp-Slinger' class ships that generates temporal waves and prevents slipping into parallel dimensions.

relations.description: Hyper-Chrono Displacement is caused by the Reality Anchor component on Warp-Slinger ships.
The Warp-Slinger program is under review due to the risks of Hyper-Chrono Displacement.
Hyper-Chrono Displacement is caused by prolonged exposure to temporal fluctuations.
Memory fragmentation is a symptom of Hyper-Chrono Displacement.
Neuro-regeneration is a treatment for Hyper-Chrono Displacement.
Jax 'Comet' Riley is the first documented case of Hyper-Chrono Displacement.
Hyper-Chrono Displacement occurs during FTL travel due to temporal fluctuations.
Distorted time perception is a symptom of Hyper-Chrono Displacement.
Pilots are limited to 500 FTL hours per year to prevent Hyper-Chrono Displacement.
